gettingStarted.title: Welcome to Brika
gettingStarted.subtitle: A self-hosted automation hub. Install plugins to get blocks, bricks, and sparks. Then chain them together as workflows.
gettingStarted.learnMore: What are plugins, blocks, bricks, sparks, and workflows?

installPlugin.title: Install plugins
installPlugin.description: Each plugin adds blocks, bricks, and sparks for one integration.

composeBoard.title: Compose dashboards
composeBoard.description: Drop bricks onto a board to see what's happening at a glance.

buildWorkflow.title: Build workflows
buildWorkflow.description: Connect blocks to react to sparks and automate the boring stuff.
